page_metadata.biotools__summary:
a PyMOL plugin for visualization, comparison, and volume calculation of drug-binding sites.

volume calculation and segmentation.

PyVOL: Protein Pocket Visualization, Segmentation, and Characterization.

PyVOL is a python library packaged into a PyMOL GUI for identifying protein binding pockets, partitioning them into sub-pockets, and calculating their volumes
